title: Architecture & Automatum
description: A neoforge Create modpack made for the A&A SMP.
body:
![The Banner of the server this is used on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/448705d0783079ae59637e3f65f5a316f63156dd.png)
# 🚂 The Architecture & Automatum Experience
Curated exclusively for the [Architecture & Automatum](https://discord.com/invite/RF6pna33Rv) community, this modpack delivers a highly optimized, heavily expanded Create mod server experience.

## ✨ Core Features

- Create Mod Expansion: Dozens of add-ons like Enchantment Industry, Slice & Dice, and Steam 'n' Rails multiply your mechanical and logistical possibilities.
- Peak Performance: Powered by Sodium, Lithium, ModernFix, and FerriteCore for high FPS and smooth gameplay.
- Seamless QoL: JEI, EMI, and Mouse Tweaks handle tedious inventory management so you can focus on engineering.
- Immersive Aesthetics: Beautify your builds with Chipped, Rechiseled, Iris Shaders, and map your world with Xaero's Minimap.
- Expanded Exploration: Discover new culinary options and biomes with the Farmer's Delight series and Nature's Compass.

## 🏗️ Why Play With Us?
We combine endless creative potential with ultimate player comfort. Download now to join [Architecture & Automatum](https://discord.com/invite/RF6pna33Rv) and experience Create like never before!
